objective: Run bounded native-checkpoint generation/NLL quality for score32/w16 RTL exact-divide softmax after reciprocal-LUT q16 failed the same gate.

decoder_contract.attention_mixed_int8_score32_w16_rtl_exa: Run a bounded native-checkpoint generation/NLL gate for score32/w16 RTL exact-divide softmax. This isolates whether the q16 reciprocal-LUT quality failure comes from the reciprocal approximation or from the shared RTL softmax weight/exponent model.

evaluation_record.title: Llama7B score32/w16 RTL exact-divide generation quality
evaluation_record.primary_question: Does the score32/w16 RTL exact-divide softmax candidate preserve bounded greedy generation and teacher-forced reference-token likelihood on a 7B checkpoint?
evaluation_record.expected_reason: If RTL exact-divide passes, recover by improving reciprocal approximation. If it fails, recover by replacing the shared RTL softmax exponent/weight approximation.
evaluation_record.summary: Decoder mixed/int8 generation quality evidence recorded from runs/datasets/llm_decoder_eval_gpt2_prompt_stress_v1/decoder_attention_mixed_int8_score32_w16_rtl_exact_generation_quality__l2_decoder_attention_mixed_int8_score32_w16_rtl_exact_generation_quality_llama7b_v1.json: decision=mixed_int8_generation_quality_hold; candidate_id=score32_w16_rtl_exact; prompt_count=8; generation_steps=8; free_run_exact_match_rate=0.0; free_run_token_match_rate=0.078125; diverged_prompt_count=8; mean_first_divergence_step=0.5; teacher_forced_mean_reference_nll=1.073770096930964; teacher_forced_mean_candidate_nll=2.6074809896126507; teacher_forced_mean_nll_delta=1.5337108926816854; teacher_forced_reference_token_prob_mean=0.4479845997119758; teacher_forced_candidate_reference_token_prob_mean=0.25191303969855044; next_step=Hold this score32 mixed/int8 generation candidate until a narrower score-precision boundary demonstrates better free-running agreement.
